items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **Management Plane Generator (MPG) migration** tracking issue for `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices` — migrating from AutoRest/Swagger-based generation to TypeSpec-based generation. It is a sub-issue of the parent tracking issue [#53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864).

<details>
<summary>📦 Current Package State</summary>

- **Package**: `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices`
- **Location**: `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/`
- **Current version**: `1.6.0-beta.1` (ApiCompatVersion: `1.5.2`)
- **Generation method**: AutoRest (has `autorest.md`, no `tsp-location.yaml`)
- **Swagger source**: `https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/78c97002d557d9aca3f8220b4a4774ed5aae3a09/specification/cognitiveservices/resource-manager/readme.md`
- **Status**: ❌ Not yet migrated to TypeSpec

</details>

<details>
<summary>📋 Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Verify TypeSpec spec exists at `specification/cognitiveservices/resource-manager/` in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs)
- [ ] Create `tsp-location.yaml` under `sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices/`
- [ ] Run the MPG migration using the [`mpg-sdk-migration` skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/)
- [ ] Regenerate the SDK from TypeSpec
- [ ] Resolve any breaking changes (API compatibility violations against `ApiCompatVersion: 1.5.2`)
- [ ] Apply necessary customizations in `Customizations/` directory for any breaking changes
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` with migration notes
- [ ] Validate the build and run tests
- [ ] Submit PR for review

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Debugging & Migration Guidance</summary>

**Key commands:**
```bash
# Check if TypeSpec spec exists in azure-rest-api-specs
ls specification/cognitiveservices/resource-manager/*.tsp 2>/dev/null

# After creating tsp-location.yaml, generate the SDK
cd sdk/cognitiveservices/Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices
dotnet build /t:GenerateCode -v d

# Validate build
dotnet build

# Run tests
dotnet test --filter TestCategory!=Live
```

**Breaking change mitigation**: The `ApiCompatVersion` is set to `1.5.2`, so any API surface changes from the migration must be carefully handled. Use patterns like:
- `[CodeGenType]` / `[CodeGenSuppress]` for suppressions
- `@`@clientName`` in `client.tsp` for renames
- `@`@Azure`.ClientGenerator.Core.Legacy.hierarchyBuilding` for base type changes

</details>

<details>
<summary>📚 Relevant Resources</summary>

- [MPG Migration Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md)
- [Mitigate Breaking Changes Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md)
- [Parent Tracking Issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)
- [Completed Migrations Tracking #55080](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)
- [azure-sdk-for-net CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Labels Applied</summary>

- `Mgmt` — Management plane SDK issue ✅ (already present)
- `CodeGen` — Code generation related ✅ (already present)
- `Service Attention` — No CODEOWNERS entry found for `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices`, flagging for service team attention

</details>
